case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. MARICELA MARTINEZ ORTEGA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-20-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-05-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CLAUDIA BARDALES-LEGAL SERVICES SUPERVISOR.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $724.55 FILED BY DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ ORTEGA, MARICELA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-05-2013 DEPT. 506, JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; NOT REPORTED. PLAINTIFF PRESENT, NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. MATTER WAS HEARD, ARGUED AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHIBIT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2013 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) /AUTH TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ ORTEGA, MARICELA $724.55 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $794.55 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ ORTEGA, MARICELA
